summary: Comprehensive backend testing for Glowmatch API completed. All 9 backend tests passed (catalog endpoints + both AI endpoints using Claude Sonnet 4.5 and Gemini Nano Banana via Emergent LLM key).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: AI endpoints have generous fallback paths (top-rated picks if Claude returns no valid IDs; original image if Gemini returns no image). Good resilience.
catalog.py uses uuid5 deterministic IDs - stable across restarts (good).
Consider validating image_base64 input format before sending to Gemini (currently passes through raw).
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in app. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY present in backend/.env.
seed_data_creation: None - uses built-in catalog.py with ~45 products across visage/corps/cosmetiques.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully functional. AI endpoints: select-products (Claude Sonnet 4.5) takes ~10-15s, apply-makeup (Gemini Nano Banana) takes ~15-20s with tiny JPEG. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_glowmatch_api.py covers all endpoints. Frontend not yet tested per request.
